title: KIMS Hospitals, Mahadevapura inaugurates KIMS RENOVA Oncology Institute to transform cancer care
summary: KIMS Hospitals, Mahadevapura, Bengaluru, today inaugurated the KIMS RENOVA Oncology Institute, a comprehensive cancer care centre envisioned to provide advanced, integrated, and patient-centric oncology services. The institute was inaugurated by […]
thbAction: Map the news to THB's provider CRM for referral growth, patient lifecycle engagement, and multi-facility relationship management across hospital and provider networks.
contentHtml:
KIMS Hospitals, Mahadevapura, Bengaluru, today inaugurated the KIMS RENOVA Oncology Institute, a comprehensive cancer care centre envisioned to provide advanced, integrated, and patient-centric oncology services. The institute was inaugurated by VVS Laxman, Legendary Former Indian International Cricketer and Head of Cricket at the National Cricket Academy (NCA), marking a significant milestone in strengthening cancer care capabilities in Bengaluru.

The launch event brought together healthcare leaders, oncology specialists, dignitaries, cancer survivors, and community representatives to celebrate the beginning of a new chapter in comprehensive cancer care focused on innovation, precision, and compassionate treatment.

The event featured ‘Samrohana Sarathi Survivor Program’, a special initiative dedicated to celebrating the courage and resilience of cancer survivors. As part of the Samrohana Sarathi Survivor Program, cancer warriors were honoured for their inspiring journeys and contribution towards creating awareness and hope for others battling cancer.

As part of its commitment towards early detection and community health, KIMS RENOVA Oncology Institute along with Samrohana Cancer Foundation announced the “134 Free Screening Camp Pledge”, inspired by the remarkable legacy of Mr. VVS Laxman, who represented India in 134 Test matches. The initiative aims to conduct 134 free awareness & screening camps for underserved communities, reinforcing the importance of prevention, awareness, and early diagnosis in the fight against cancer.

The inauguration also included a unique and insightful Fireside Chat featuring cricketing legend Mr. VVS Laxman alongside KIMS Hospitals’ leading experts: Dr. Sandeep Nayak (Chairman – Oncology & Executive Director – Surgical Oncology & Robotic Surgery) and Dr. Suresh Babu M C (Director – Medical Oncology). The panel explored the striking similarities between cricket and cancer care, discussing how the necessity for strong partnerships, adapting to changing conditions, and playing a “long innings” perfectly mirror the multidisciplinary approach required to overcome cancer.

The KIMS RENOVA Oncology Institute, in association with KIMS MACS OncoSurgery, represents a comprehensive oncology ecosystem integrating expertise across Surgical Oncology, Robotic Surgery, Medical Oncology, and multidisciplinary cancer care. The collaboration strengthens KIMS Hospitals’ commitment to providing advanced diagnosis, precision treatment, and holistic support for cancer patients.

Commenting on the launch, Dr B Bhaskar Rao, Chairman and Managing Director, KIMS Group of Hospitals, said, “Our strategy is to scale our footprint and ensure world-class healthcare is accessible to everyone, integrating clinical precision with genuine patient care. The inauguration of the KIMS RENOVA Oncology Institute in Mahadevapura, Bengaluru, marks a new milestone in this journey.  By bringing together advanced oncological technology and renowned medical experts, we are setting a benchmark in cancer care.”

Speaking on the occasion, Dr Nitish Shetty, Managing Director, KIMS Hospitals (Krishna Institute of Medical Sciences), Bengaluru, mentioned, “The launch of KIMS RENOVA Oncology Institute is a significant step towards our vision of bringing world-class, comprehensive cancer care closer to patients. Through this collaboration, we are combining KIMS Hospitals’ clinical expertise and healthcare infrastructure with RENOVA’s focused oncology excellence and KIMS MACS Onco Surgery’s surgical oncology capabilities to create a centre that delivers advanced treatment with compassion and precision.”

Dr Sandeep Nayak, Chairman – Oncology & Executive Director – Surgical Oncology & Robotic Surgery, KIMS Hospitals (Krishna Institute of Medical Sciences), Bengaluru, said, “Cancer treatment today requires precision, collaboration, and expertise across multiple disciplines. Through KIMS RENOVA Oncology Institute and KIMS MACS Onco Surgery, we are bringing together advanced surgical techniques, robotic surgery, medical oncology, and comprehensive cancer management to provide personalised care pathways for every patient.”

Sridhar Peddireddy, Founder & CEO, Renova Hospitals, said, “Our association with KIMS Hospitals represents a shared vision of transforming oncology care. By combining RENOVA’s specialised oncology expertise with KIMS Hospitals’ strong clinical ecosystem and KIMS MACS Onco Surgery’s excellence in surgical oncology, we aim to deliver accessible, advanced, and compassionate cancer care.”

KIMS RENOVA Oncology Institute is designed to offer a complete spectrum of cancer care services, including prevention, screening, diagnosis, medical oncology, surgical oncology, robotic surgery, and supportive care through a coordinated multidisciplinary model.

The launch marks an important step towards improving access to advanced oncology care and building a stronger ecosystem for cancer treatment and survivorship in Bengaluru and surrounding regions.
